value_chain_position: Custom AI ASIC design + high-speed networking silicon (PAM4 DSPs, PCIe retimers) — supplies hyperscaler-specific inference chips and the SerDes/DSP layer for 800G/1.6T optical data-center networks.
relative_comps: Marvell's AI revenue reached ~$700M/quarter and is growing faster than AVGO's custom-ASIC segment on a percentage basis; key customers include Amazon (Trainium/Inferentia) and Google. Its cloud-optimized 5nm custom ASICs command high ASPs. The networking DSP business competes directly with AVGO/Inphi (now part of MRVL after acquisition) and MACOM. Trades at ~35x forward earnings, a premium to AVGO reflecting its higher-growth AI mix and smaller base; the risk is customer concentration (Amazon + Google = majority of AI revenue).
